title.en: In a short period of time, Ye Tian harvested a ...

content.en:
Soon, there was a battle in the Extreme Demon Ape Graveyard, and it was obvious that something good had been found.

And the two sides of the battle were Extreme Dao creatures at the level of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, Ye Tian avoided them, so there was no need to get involved.

I have to say that the resources in the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Graveyard are really rich.

Of course, these resources are not the resources of the Extreme Demon Ape, but the resources that were slowly bred here after the fall of the Extreme Demon Ape.

After all, the Extreme Demon Ape Cemetery used to be one of his lairs, and it was transformed into a cemetery after his death, and this place is strictly speaking a full treasure land, plus there have been countless years of no Extreme Dao creatures entering this cemetery, resulting in a lot of resources here, and some resources can be found every other distance.

Along.

Ye Tian saw some resources, no matter what they were, and picked them directly, without even analyzing the usefulness and origin of the resources.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian harvested a lot.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian came to an area, and this area actually had golden points of light.

In fact, these were not golden points of light, but golden fruits, rooted in this void, absorbing the power of the Extreme Dao rules around them.

"Extreme Golden Fruit!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He didn't expect to see so many Extreme Dao Golden Fruits here, if you look at the number, there are more than three hundred!

What is the concept of 300 Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, one Extreme Dao Golden Fruit can be sold for 1,000 Extreme Dao Coins at the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Trade Fair, and 300 Extreme Dao Golden Fruits are equivalent to 300,000 Extreme Dao Coins!

For those Extreme Dao creatures who control the Void Realm and True Realm, 300,000 Extreme Dao Coins is also a very large number.

And for those top forces at the end of the realm, three hundred Extreme Dao Golden Fruits were enough for them to fight hard.

Swish!

Ye Tian instantly crossed over at a speed beyond the limit, and with a wave of his hand, he was about to take away the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit here.

And at this time, another Extreme Creature also came, and also made a move.

This Extreme Dao creature is the perfect controller of the Void Realm, for this Extreme Dao creature, there is no way to use the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit to break the chain of the Extreme Dao, but the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit is of high value, and it is an unimaginable resource to take it out and sell it!

Therefore, the other party is also bound to win.

Moreover, they had to take the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit here immediately, otherwise it would not be their turn when the Extreme Dao Creature, the perfect controller of the True Realm, came here.

"A super-perfect master, the Extreme Dao Creature, also dares to compete with me for the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, looking for death!

The other party snorted coldly.

However, he underestimated Ye Tian, and more importantly, he forgot that this was the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Cemetery, and the Extreme Dao rules here suppressed his strength, so the strength he exerted was very low.

Of course, he thought that Ye Tian's strength would not be able to exert much.

And it is easy for the perfect controller of the virtual realm to kill the perfect controller such as Chao.

"This guy is a real body, and the suppression of the Extreme Dao rules here is very powerful, and the perception of those Extreme Dao creatures can't spread far, if I go all out and kill this guy, there won't be any risk. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

If there were a lot of Extreme Creatures around, he would definitely not dare to go all out, but now there were only the two of them in the vicinity.

"Then go all out!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Suddenly.

A kind of extreme power emerged from his body, against the rules of the Extreme Demon Ape Graveyard.

In an instant, thousands of extreme paths erupted.

At this moment, the Extreme Dao creature on the opposite side was stunned.

"This ......"

His head was directly confused.

A Polar Path creature has mastered thousands of Extreme Paths? Doesn't a normal Extreme Path creature master a few Extreme Paths at most? If it does not contain the origin of that Extreme Path, it is more difficult to comprehend a new Extreme Path, I don't know how many times greater.

Therefore, among the Extreme Dao creatures, there are extremely few strong people who have comprehended more than five Extreme Dao Paths, and even if there are Extreme Dao creatures who have really comprehended more than a dozen Extreme Dao Paths, most of them have just comprehended them, and they have no effect.

But thousands of extreme paths are abnormal, breaking his cognition.

This extreme creature was stunned, but Ye Tian didn't stop!

"Infinite Pole Blade!"

This move was the strongest extreme control technique Ye Tian had ever created, and it used a lot of power.

At this moment, Ye Tian exerted his peak strength.

And his own strength is comparable to that of an ordinary Realm Perfect Controller, or even more powerful.

And this Extreme Dao Creature who is the perfect controller of the Void Realm is suppressed by the Extreme Dao rules here, and his strength is very weak and weak, where can he compete with Ye Tian!

"No!"

The Extreme Creature was desperate.

He is the perfect controller of the Void Realm, how can he die here, or at the hands of a super perfect master!

He is unwilling!

Poof!

The Endless Extreme Blade tore apart the Extreme Creature's body, shattering and annihilating everything in his body.

In an instant, the perfect master of the Void Realm fell.

"I didn't expect that I would instantly kill this Extreme Dao Creature, the perfect controller of the Void Realm!!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, but when he thought that the other party's strength was suppressed, it was not surprising.

Originally, he planned to kill the other party in a few moves, but now it seems that he doesn't need it.

Then, Ye Tian took the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit here, and then took away the treasure resources on this Extreme Dao creature, and then smashed the body of the Extreme Dao creature with one blow, and then left quickly.

Soon, a few more extreme creatures came here, and after carefully sensing them, they shook their heads and left.

The fall of a perfect controller of the Void Realm, if it is at the end of the realm, it is a big thing, but it is nothing here, and no other extreme path creature will care.

Although there were a lot of resources for the birth of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Cemetery, it didn't take long for them to be collected by all these Extreme Dao creatures.

Next, it is the real treasure belonging of the Extreme Demon Ape Cemetery.

Demon Ape Ancient Mountain.

A group of Extreme Dao creatures poured into here, and a dragon battle broke out here, and the great battle quickly shattered the Demon Ape Ancient Mountain, and a large number of Extreme Dao treasures and perfect exotic treasures collapsed and flew away.

......

An emerald green light tore through the void and fell in front of Ye Tian.

Ye Tian caught this perfect treasure, took a closer look, and was suddenly a little surprised: "Advanced perfect treasure!"

Although the high-grade perfect treasure is not too precious to him now, its value is still very high!

I thought that he couldn't even get a primary-grade perfect treasure at the beginning, but he didn't expect that now he can pick up a high-grade perfect treasure on the road.

Just as Ye Tian was about to go over and grab some treasures, a terrifying battle broke out.

Thundered!!!!

Two imposing bodies fought in the cemetery.

One of them, Ye Tian knew, was the master of the stone pupils.
